limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 (named programs, no quantified scale).

Risk disclosure is detailed and company-specific with named mechanisms (model governance, EU AI Act compliance timelines, IP/privacy risks from training data, cyberattack vectors via AI), supporting score 4; no quantified risk figures or named oversight body found to reach score 5.
